# Kindario v0.6.0

Template interaction and repository publication milestone.

## Highlights

- Removed the floating start section from the public template pages.
- Standardized selected section backgrounds to `#f4f4f4`.
- Reworked route carousel media from pseudo-elements into inline HTML media layers.
- Added full-card links for route, aid campaign, and ticket cards while preserving the restored carousel drag behavior.
- Confirmed repository governance files remain English-first and proprietary-license aligned.

## Validation

- Carousel drag restored and verified on `template/index.html` and `template/index-2.html`.
- JavaScript syntax checked with `node --check` for the active carousel scripts.
- No temporary QA files are intended for publication.
